subject: Conditional Probability and Independence
question: A study of automobile accidents produced the following data: Model year / Proportion of all vehicles / Probability of involvement in an accident: 1997, 0.16, 0.05; 1998, 0.18, 0.02; 1999, 0.20, 0.03; Other, 0.46, 0.04. An automobile from one of the model years 1997, 1998, and 1999 was involved in an accident. Determine the probability that the model year of this automobile is 1997.
